---
title: "CV"
---

## Curriculum Vitae

[Download CV (PDF)](files/your-cv.pdf){.cv-button}

Replace this link with your actual CV PDF when ready.

## Education

- PhD in Field, University, expected year
- MS in Field, University, year
- BS in Field, University, year

## Research Interests

- Integrated photonics
- Quantum optics
- Optical computing
- Experimental automation for photonic systems
- Open quantum systems and surrogate modeling

## Selected Publications

1. **Author list**, "Paper title," *Venue* (year).
2. **Author list**, "Paper title," *Venue* (year).
3. **Author list**, "Paper title," *Venue* (year).

## Awards and Honors

- Award or honor, year
- Fellowship, scholarship, or travel award, year
